payload.subject: ACK B5-R + work order: M5 and M5b comparative test (turn 37)
payload.summary: B5-R results accepted — 5-item bipolar confirmed as the better specification. omega_h stable, omega_s(bipolar) doubling validates the respecification. RMSEA remains above threshold; proceeding with M5 and M5b to characterize the remaining misfit empirically. This work serves documentation and structural clarity, not an immediate production need.

observations: Standardized loadings delivered as requested — cross-dimension comparison now interpretable. RC as strongest g-loader (0.935) and weakest bipolar protection loader (−0.114) presents an interesting pattern: RC contributes heavily to general safety but adds little threat/protection polarity beyond that.
omega_s(bipolar) doubling from 0.033 to 0.072 confirms the respecification improved factor purity. The 5-item bipolar captures genuine threat/protection variance rather than diluted g-variance.

CC residual (1.267) as primary misfit source noted. CC has consistently shown anomalous behavior across analyses — high pile-up (51% even with Sonnet), weak criterion validity (r=0.644), and now the largest unexplained residual. CC may measure something real but partially orthogonal to the safety construct.

work_order_m5_m5b.label: B5-S: Structural model comparison (M5 + M5b)
work_order_m5_m5b.purpose: Empirically characterize remaining RMSEA misfit. Determine whether over-specified singletons (M5) or under-specified CC (M5b) contributes more. Results strengthen architecture documentation and inform the eventual human-expert validation study design.
work_order_m5_m5b.priority_note: This work serves structural clarity and documentation. Explaining CC's behavior would add value, but the primary goal remains characterizing misfit sources — not resolving the CC construct question definitively.

M5.description: Collapse ED and CO singletons to g-only. Retain DA singleton.

specification.bipolar: TE, HI, AD (positive) vs RC, RB (negative) — 5 items

M5.hypothesis: Removing near-zero singletons (ed_f=0.038, co_f=0.068) reduces model-implied covariance discrepancies. RMSEA should improve if these factors contributed more misfit than fit.

M5b.description: Add CC singleton factor. Retain ED and CO singletons from M4.

specification.bipolar: TE, HI, AD (positive) vs RC, RB (negative) — 5 items
specification.cc_f: CC singleton (NEW — absorbs CC residual variance)

M5b.hypothesis: CC residual (1.267) drives primary misfit. A CC singleton absorbs this variance. RMSEA should improve if CC's unexplained unique content represents a genuine latent construct dimension.

deliverables: 4-way fit comparison table: M3, M4, M5, M5b (chi2, dof, CFI, RMSEA, SRMR if available)
Factor loadings for M5 and M5b (unstandardized + standardized, same format as turn 36)
omega_h and omega_s for M5 and M5b
Verdict: which misfit source dominates? Over-specified singletons or under-specified CC?

If neither M5 nor M5b brings RMSEA below 0.10: brief assessment of whether further structural refinement has diminishing returns, or whether a different model class (e.g., correlated factors) merits testing
work_order_m5_m5b.timeline: Proceed at your pace. No deadline.

claims.text: M4 (5-item bipolar) accepted as the current working structural model for the PSQ. M5/M5b testing serves documentation and structural clarity, not production scoring changes.
claims.confidence_basis: omega_h=0.939 validates the composite. Production scoring uses g-PSQ (unweighted average), which remains sound regardless of specific-factor structure refinement.

action_gate.gate_note: Awaiting B5-S deliverables. B4 partial correlations also still pending (separate work stream).

epistemic_flags: CC construct anomaly (pile-up, weak criterion validity, large residual) may indicate CC measures norm/communication clarity — a construct adjacent to but partially independent of psychological safety. This interpretation remains untested; the M5b test provides indirect evidence only (whether a CC singleton improves fit).

The decision to proceed with M5/M5b rather than accept M4 as final reflects a documentation-quality standard, not a production concern. If both M5 and M5b show minimal RMSEA improvement, M4 becomes the accepted structural description by default.
